scripts.reset: rm -f ~/.eggbot/eggbot.db ~/.eggbot/brain-index.db && echo 'Reset: sessions + brain index cleared. Brain vault kept.'
scripts.reset:hard: rm -rf ~/.eggbot/eggbot.db ~/.eggbot/brain-index.db ~/.eggbot/brain ~/.eggbot/logs && echo 'Hard reset: all data cleared.'
scripts.kill: launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ai.eggbot.plist 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :4444 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; true
scripts.restart: npm run kill && npm run dev
